entries.word: He was paralyzed by fear.
Tom hit his head on the roof of the car.
entries.translation: Том ударился головой о потолок машины.

entries.word: You have to come back in 30 minutes.
entries.translation: Ты должен вернуться через тридцать минут.

entries.word: I tried to get back to sleep.
My foot fell asleep.
Tom has come back.
Tom wants to sit in the back.
I want to know what Tom's blood type is.
entries.translation: Я хочу узнать, какая у Тома группа крови.

entries.word: I want my desk back.
entries.translation: Я хочу, чтобы мне вернули мой стол.

entries.word: She took me by the hand.
Tom never wins at tic-tac-toe.
entries.translation: Том никогда не выигрывает в крестики-нолики.

entries.word: I know that you're going to come back.
Tom lowered his head.
Tom pressed his face against the window.
Tom just came back from there.
He broke his leg skiing.
entries.translation: Он сломал себе ногу, катаясь на лыжах.

entries.word: My right hand is numb.
Tom's face lit up with joy.
I'm brushing my hair.
Tom refused to shake my hand.
Tom felt Mary's forehead.
Tom's face was all black and blue.
entries.translation: Лицо Тома было всё в синяках.

entries.word: Tom broke his arm, not his leg.
entries.translation: Том руку сломал, а не ногу.
